How It Works

From signup to Withdraw, Your funded trading journey in 4 simple steps.

Step 1
Purchase a Challenge

Choose your path: Instant Funding, 1 or 2 Step Challenge

Step 2
Get Your Capital

Start trading immediately with Instant Funding or unlock capital progressively with our challenge accounts.

Step 3
Trade & Grow

Follow the rules, manage risk, and trade to maximize your profits.

Step 4
Withdraw Your Earnings

Keep your profits and withdraw anytime. It’s your capital, your rewards.

Get Funded
Why Traders Choose Finotive

Built for traders who want more than just funding. Finotive gives you the technology, execution speed, and support to scale with confidence.

Instant Funding & Fast Payouts

Start trading immediately after purchase. Instant trading and fast payouts through Finotive Pay, Bank Transfer, Revolut, or Crypto withdrawals.

All-in-One Trading Ecosystem

Finotive Funding is part of Finotive One. A fully integrated trading ecosystem designed to empower traders worldwide.

Transparent Rules. Trader First.

No hidden restrictions or unclear limits. Every rule exists to protect traders and maximize long-term funding opportunities.

Trader Education & Support

Access free trading resources, webinars, and active Discord communities to keep growing beyond the challenge

Get Funded
Flexible Trading Accounts for Every Strategy

Find a program that fits your trading style. From fast-track challenges to instant funding, Finotive gives every trader a fair and flexible path to capital.

Finotive Funding is a trading name of Finotive Funding Technologies Limited (Company Number: 11088), having its registered office at Innovation One Building, Level 2, DIFC, Dubai, UAE, and VAT Registration Number 105195257800003. Finotive Funding Technologies Limited forms part of the Finotive One group of companies.

Finotive Funding is a proprietary trading firm and does not provide investment services, investment advice, brokerage accounts, or accept capital deposits. Finotive Funding does not provide any of the investment services listed under the Capital Market Undertakings Act No. 256/2004 Coll. Trading platforms are powered by Finotive Markets LLC. By signing up to Finotive Funding, you agree to the terms and conditions of Finotive Funding, as well as the terms and conditions of the brokerage, Finotive Markets LLC.

All information made available on this site is intended solely for educational and evaluative purposes in relation to trading on financial markets and does not constitute, and should not be construed as, investment advice, investment recommendations, business recommendations, analysis of investment opportunities, or any similar general recommendation in relation to the trading of financial instruments. Trading in financial markets is a high-risk activity, and you should never risk more than you can afford to lose.

Payments relating to services provided by Finotive One entities may be received, administered, and processed by Finotive Pay (CY) Limited (Company Number: HE475209), having its registered office at 228 Archbishop Makarios III Ave, Agios Pavlos Court, Block A, Office 113, 3030 Limassol, Cyprus, in its capacity as payment agent acting for and on behalf of Finotive One group companies, including, without limitation, Finotive Funding Technologies Limited.

The services offered on this site are not intended for residents of the Iran, or North Korea (officially, the Democratic People's Republic of Korea), or for use by any person in any country or jurisdiction where such distribution or use would be contrary to applicable local law or regulation.
